creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
My Guide to Florida is finally here! 🌴✨

I’m so excited to share something I’ve been working on behind the scenes for the past few months — my very own personalized Florida travel guide and interactive map.

This map brings together everything I love about Florida — from the best places to stay, hidden beaches, and crystal-clear natural springs to my favorite restaurants, coffee shops, and bars. You’ll also find parks, botanical gardens, wildlife spots, and off-the-beaten-path places only locals know about 😍

I’m constantly asked what to see, where to go, and what’s actually worth it in Florida, so I wanted to pull together years of memories, local knowledge, and hidden gems from living and traveling all over this incredible state — all in one easy-to-use place to help you plan your next adventure.

There are over 1,000 handpicked locations on the map, plus itineraries and travel tips — and it doesn’t stop there. Every time I discover a new spot, I add it, so you’ll always have something new to explore.

If you want to check it out, comment “Guide” and I’ll send you a link to check it out! 

You can also head to the link in my bio or visit:
👉 https://www.rexby.com/Thefloridaqueenie/florida

I truly hope this guide helps you create amazing memories in the state I’ve proudly called home my entire life. 💙

— Kishia

#floridatravelguide #exploreflorida #visitflorida #floridahiddengems #floridatravelinspo
